summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated artifact reports no security-sensitive items, merge/fix actions are blocked, low-signal and instant close are disabled, and this shard has no shared canonical. Hydrated PRs are kept as independent inventory items. Items with unavailable live state are marked needs_human because the artifact provides no target_updated_at value safe for deterministic replay.
